scope: Per-hand zero/off placeholder materialization for Main Flow nodes 1051-1054.
review_basis: Lane 1 spatial asset policy decision authorizing zero/off placeholders.
Hash and dimension validation of the four exact-name placeholder masks.
Post-materialization Main Flow spatial asset audit.

checks.name: hand_count_and_left_right_identity
checks.notes: The files are zero/off placeholders and intentionally do not encode hand identity.

checks.name: per_hand_mask_alignment
checks.notes: Alignment cannot be evaluated until same-scene nonzero split masks exist.

checks.name: missing_reference_resolution
checks.notes: Exact-name files now exist at nodes 1051-1054 paths and are 1024x1024.

checks.name: false_geometry_avoidance
checks.notes: Lane 2 used all-zero masks instead of copying cross-scene strict side-push masks or relabeling a combined hand mask.

checks.name: collision_and_soft_body_deformation
checks.notes: Runtime output and nonzero actor/receiver split masks are required before collision/deformation quality can be accepted.

limitations: No live ComfyUI runtime validation was performed by Lane 2.
These masks are file-resolution controls only; they do not prove hand anatomy or per-hand contact quality.
next_action: Lane 1 should re-run reference validation; Lane 4 should perform runtime validation in a lease window if requested.
